name: foresight
description: Provable prediction reputation on TxLINE + Solana — verified prediction league for the TxODDS World Cup Hackathon.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:core && npm run test:inline && npm run test:ui && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:wallet
scripts.test:domains: node test/identity-binding.test.js && node test/proof-receipts.test.js && node test/live-state.test.js && node test/live-poll.test.js && node test/follow.test.js && node test-accessibility-performance.js
scripts.test:services: npm --prefix ledger test && npm --prefix relay test && npm --prefix evaluation test && npm --prefix agent-ingest test && npm --prefix proof-pages test && npm --prefix monetization test
scripts.test:extended: npm run test:all && npm run test:domains && npm run test:services
